brand.name: Cascina Paradiso
brand.tagline: Bergamasco cooking. Wood-fired grill. A family tradition.

hero.title: The flavour you don't forget
hero.subtitle: Wood-fired meat, local produce, and a family story that opens its doors again.

storytelling.line4: who has reopened the historic family business
storytelling.line7: and which today returns to its original name:

fire.title: The fire
fire.description: Live coals are the heart of our kitchen. Selected meats, slowly cooked over the flame — the way it used to be done.

land.title: Local produce
land.description: Ingredients from the Bergamasco valleys. Cheeses, cured meats, vegetables — we know exactly where they come from.

family.title: Family tradition
family.description: The recipes Roberta learned in this kitchen, brought back to the table with the same care as fifty years ago.

menuTeaser.title: A return to the origins.
menuTeaser.description: Casoncelli, polenta taragna, fassona steak, rosemary ribs. A kitchen that speaks Bergamasco.

cta.title: Come see us
cta.description: The table is ready. The fire is lit. We're waiting for you.

hero.title: Fifty years of live fire.
hero.subtitle: From the historic Cantina Cerea to Cascina Paradiso: a family legacy still served at the table.

storia.intro: In the heart of Alzano Lombardo, a family, a farmhouse, a table. For over fifty years we've told the story of Bergamasco cooking the way we received it: with respect, with memory, with fire.

y1972.title: Cantina Cerea is born
y1972.body: The Cerea family opens their cantina on Via Ghilardi. A simple place, made for wine, polenta, and an evening in good company.

y1985.title: The grill becomes a ritual
y1985.body: The wood-burning hearth takes centre stage. Local meats, cooked on live coals, become our signature.

y2005.title: Cascina Cerea
y2005.body: The business grows. The name changes along with the dining room, but the spirit stays the same: real food, real people.

y2024.title: Welcome back, Roberta
y2024.body: Roberta reopens the doors of the farmhouse and gives it back its original name: Cascina Paradiso. The circle closes, the story begins again.

storia.quote: We didn't reinvent anything. We just remembered.

hero.title: Recipes of a valley.
hero.subtitle: A seasonal kitchen that changes with the calendar. Here you'll find the dishes that tell you who we are, better than words can.

menu.intro: A seasonal kitchen that changes with the calendar. Here you'll find the dishes that tell you who we are, better than words can.
menu.note: The menu is indicative. Ask the staff for the dishes of the day and seasonal proposals. Please inform our team of any allergies or intolerances.

antipasti.name: Local cured meats
antipasti.desc: Selection of artisan Bergamasco salumi, served with ancient-grain bread.

antipasti.name: Alpine cheeses
antipasti.desc: Mountain cheeses with honey, preserves, and Grumello walnuts.

antipasti.name: Polenta and mushrooms
antipasti.desc: Polenta taragna, sautéed porcini, shavings of Branzi.

primi.name: Casoncelli bergamasca
primi.desc: Fresh filled pasta, melted butter, sage, crisp pancetta.

primi.name: Tagliatelle with brasato ragù
primi.desc: Hand-rolled tagliatelle, slow-braised beef ragù in Valcalepio wine.

primi.name: Taleggio risotto
primi.desc: Carnaroli rice, Taleggio DOP, caramelised pears.

brace.name: Fassona steak
brace.desc: Piedmontese fassona, Cervia salt, rocket and grana.

brace.name: Rosemary pork ribs
brace.desc: Local pork ribs, slow-cooked over live coals.

brace.name: Beef fillet
brace.desc: Grilled fillet, herb butter, roast potatoes.

brace.name: Free-range chicken
brace.desc: Half chicken marinated in herbs, live-coal grilled.

hero.title: We're waiting for you.
hero.subtitle: Message us, call us, or visit us in Alzano Lombardo: your table is ready.

book.title: Reservations
book.description: To book, message us on WhatsApp. We will reply as soon as possible.

hero.title: WhatsApp bookings
hero.subtitle: Fast confirmation directly with our team at +39 351 915 2082.

prenotazioni.intro: Bookings are handled directly on WhatsApp at +39 351 915 2082. Send us date, time and number of guests.

steps.title: How it works
steps.one: Open WhatsApp with the button below.
steps.two: Send the pre-filled message with your details.
steps.three: Get your confirmation from our team as soon as possible.

prenotazioni.note: For urgent requests, you can also call the same number during opening hours.

privacy.seoDescription: Information about personal data processing at Cascina Paradiso.
privacy.heroSubtitle: Clear information about what data we collect, how we protect it, and why we process it.
privacy.ownerLine1: The data controller for personal data collected through this website is:
privacy.ownerLine3: Via Guglielmo Ghilardi, 20 — 24022 Alzano Lombardo (BG), Italy
privacy.collectedIntro: This website collects the following data:
privacy.collectedNav: Navigation data — IP address, browser type, visited pages. Collected automatically for technical purposes.
privacy.collectedDirect: Voluntarily provided data — if you contact us by email or phone, we use your data only to answer your request.
privacy.collectedNote: We do not use advertising profiling systems.
privacy.legalBasisBody: Processing is based on the controller's legitimate interest for technical data and on consent for voluntarily provided data (Art. 6 GDPR).
privacy.storageBody: Data is kept only for the time necessary for the stated purposes, unless legal obligations apply.
privacy.rightsBody: You may request access, rectification, deletion, objection and portability of your data by writing to:
privacy.rightsAuthority: You may also file a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: Data is not sold to third parties for commercial purposes. It may be processed by technical suppliers only to provide the service.
privacy.cookieBody: For information about cookies, see our

cookie.seoDescription: Information on cookie usage at Cascina Paradiso.
cookie.heroSubtitle: How technical cookies are used and how browsing preferences are managed on this website.
cookie.whatBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device to improve website functionality and remember preferences.
cookie.usedIntro: We only use essential technical cookies:
cookie.usedTwo: Language cookies — remember your selected language.
cookie.usedThree: Theme cookies — remember light or dark mode.
cookie.usedNote: We do not use profiling or advertising cookies.
cookie.thirdBody: The Contact page embeds Google Maps, which may set its own cookies.
cookie.manageBody: You can disable cookies in your browser settings. Disabling technical cookies may reduce some site features.
cookie.contactsBody: For questions about cookie usage, contact us at:

data.seoDescription: Details on personal data processing, retention and user rights.
data.heroSubtitle: Processing methods, retention periods, and GDPR rights in one place.
data.purposeBody: Personal data collected through direct contact is processed to answer requests and comply with legal obligations.
data.typesOne: Identification data — name and surname, if voluntarily provided.
data.typesTwo: Contact data — email and phone number.
data.typesThree: Technical data — IP address, user-agent and server logs.
data.methodsBody: Processing is carried out with electronic tools and appropriate measures to ensure security, integrity and confidentiality.
data.retentionBody: Data is retained only for the time necessary for the stated purposes, unless legal obligations require otherwise.
data.sharingBody: Data is not shared with third parties for commercial purposes. It may be processed by appointed technical providers.
data.rightsBody: You may request access, rectification, deletion, restriction, objection and portability by writing to:

Bergamasco cooking. Wood-fired grill.
A family tradition.

errorPage.titleLine1: The page you are looking for

errorPage.descriptionCta: Go back home and start again.
